name: Lesser Poland Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the colour of the Polish eagle
the gold of the Lesser Poland coat of arms
the field of the historic coat of arms

description: Three horizontal stripes of white over yellow over red; the central yellow stripe is narrower than the outer two.
history: Adopted by the Lesser Poland Voivodeship after its creation in 1999, drawing on the historic heraldic tinctures of the region.

features.symbolism: Combines the white and red of Poland with the gold of the historic Lesser Poland coat of arms.
